sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: After the Lord was baptized, the heavens were opened, and the Spirit descended upon him like a dove, and the voice of the Father thundered: This is my beloved Son, with whom I am well pleased.

sections.title: Baptized in Water
sections.author: BUNESSAN
sections.snippet: Baptized in water, Sealed by the Spirit, Cleansed by the blood of Christ our King: Heirs of salvation,  Trusting his promise, Faithfully now God’s praise we sing.

sections.author: Owen Alstott
sections.snippet: O bless the Lord, my soul.

sections.author: Owen Alstott
sections.snippet: John said: One mightier than I is coming; he will baptize you with the Holy spirit and wire fire

sections.title: By the Love of God
sections.author: Tom Booth, Matt Maher
sections.snippet: We are signed in the water. We are sealed with the Spirit. We are saved and delivered by the love of God

sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: Behold the One of whom John said: I have seen and testified that this is the Son of God

sections.title: Come, Now Is the Time to Worship
sections.author: Brian Doerksen
sections.snippet: Come, now is the time to worship. Come, now is the time to give your heart. Come, just as you are to worship. Come, just as you are before your God. Come.

sections.title: God So Loved
sections.author: Ken Canedo
sections.snippet: God so loved the world. God so loved the world he gave his only Son, his only Son and, to those who believe in him: you shall not fear death, for you shall have eternal life.  Yes, you shall have eternal life. God so loved the world.

sections.title: Go Out, Go Out
sections.author: Curtis Stephan
sections.snippet: Go out, go out to all the world and tell the Good News, tell the Good, Good News.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lord have mercy! Christ have mercy! Lord have mercy!

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: When we eat this breadand drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world. Grant us, grant us peace.
